source: Goal.com / beIN Sports / CBS Sports / ESPN

data.value: Clear UCL favorites with 27.4% Opta win probability after finishing first in the league phase. Cannot face Real Madrid, Bayern, or Man City until a potential final. Simultaneously leading the Premier League.
Strongest non-Arsenal team featuring Harry Kane, Michael Olise, Jamal Musiala, and Luis Diaz all approaching full fitness. Multiple predictions have Bayern reaching the UCL final.
Goal.com power rankings dropped PSG after a shaky path through the play-offs. Analysts not treating PSG as a legitimate title contender, questioning defensive cohesion and depth.
Real Madrid came through the UCL play-offs in unconvincing fashion, prompting concerns from analysts. Viewed as capable of turning it on in knockouts but clearly not at their usual dominance level.
2025 Club World Cup champions are boosted by recent international tournament victory and squad depth at +1600. Considered a dark horse for the UCL crown.
